task: Submit care-membrane-mcp to Glama registry AND wong2/mcp-list

package.name: care-membrane-mcp
package.github_repo_status: exists, public, confirmed via gh search

targets.name: glama-ai/registry
targets.reason: Repository does not exist on GitHub (HTTP 404 from gh api, GraphQL 'Could not resolve', curl 404). Glama-ai org has only 3 public repos (tool-definition-quality-score, lightport, rjsf-validator-cfworker); none is a registry. Glama manages its MCP registry via web UI at https://glama.ai/mcp/servers.
commands_run: gh api users/glama-ai/repos (equiv via gh repo list glama-ai)

evidence.gh_repo_view: GraphQL: Could not resolve to a Repository with the name 'glama-ai/registry'. (repository)

targets.recommended_alternative: Manual submission via Glama web UI: https://glama.ai/mcp/servers (out of scope of PR-only task brief).

targets.name: wong2/mcp-list
targets.reason: Repository does not exist on GitHub (HTTP 404). Successor repo wong2/awesome-mcp-servers exists, but its README explicitly states: 'We do not accept PRs. Please submit your MCP on the website: https://mcpservers.org/submit'. Upstream policy blocks the PR path.

evidence.gh_repo_view: GraphQL: Could not resolve to a Repository with the name 'wong2/mcp-list'. (repository)
evidence.successor_readme_excerpt:
# Awesome MCP Servers

> [!NOTE]
> We do not accept PRs. Please submit your MCP on the website: https://mcpservers.org/submit

targets.recommended_alternative: Manual submission via the official web form: https://mcpservers.org/submit (out of scope of PR-only task brief).

summary.outcome: Both target registries are upstream-blocked for the GitHub-PR submission path. No forks, no PRs, no fake URLs. Artifacts are on disk and ready for manual web-form submission if the operator chooses to do that separately.
